title: Shelley Corman
compiled_truth: Shelley Corman is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-26), Shelley Corman sent 736 and received 2206 emails, totalling 2942 interactions. Top correspondents: [Ricki Winters](people/ricki-winters) (84), [Rick Dietz](people/rick-dietz) (67), [Lynn Blair](people/lynn-blair) (66), [Sheila Nacey](people/sheila-nacey) (52), [Bradley Holmes](people/bradley-holmes) (48).
